ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c,'Expired')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c, 'Terminated')), Permanent_Agreement__c == true, NOT(ISBLANK(ExpirationDate__c)), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must set an End Date only when the Agreement is not Permanent
